_comment: Example config for cmd/scheduler. JSON does not support comments, so _comment fields are documentation and are ignored by the Go loader.

sqlite._comment: SQLite database file where scheduler source definitions, runs, and checkpoints are stored.

_source_producer_config_comment: The scheduler reuses this file for source adapter settings and NATS publishing settings.
_poll_interval_comment: How often the continuous scheduler wakes up to check for due sources. -run-once ignores this loop interval.

sources._comment: This source must match a source name in source_producer_config. It is due every hour after its previous run.
sources.name: example-static

sources._comment: Disabled daily Greenhouse example. Enable both here and in source-producer.example.json before using it.
sources.name: example-greenhouse
